zh.lifeSummary: Alicea Pennington是Alan I de Peninton的女兒，於大約1222年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾彭寧頓。她和Baron Roger Venables IV至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於大約1306年在英國爾金德頓享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alicea Pennington是Alan I de Peninton的女儿，于大约1222年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾彭寧頓。她和Baron Roger Venables IV至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于大约1306年在英国爾金德頓享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pennington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Pennington in Furness (Lancashire), which derives from Old English pening ‘penny’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, or from Pennington in Leigh (Lancashire), which probably derives from the Old English personal name Pinna + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + Old English tūn.
habitational name from Pennington (Hampshire), or from Penton Grafton or Penton Mewsey (both Hampshire); see   Penton  . All have the same etymology as Pennington in Furness; see 1 above.

variants.name: Penington
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Pennington  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.
History: Edward Penington, born in 1667 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, was appointed surveyor-general of the province of PA in 1698 and accompanied William Penn to Philadelphia.

variants.name: Penton
meanings: habitational name from Penton Grafton or Penton Mewsey (both Hanmpshire), or from a shortened form of Pennington 2. The placenames denoted a farm or estate for which a penny tax was payable (Old English pening ‘penny’ + tūn).
in north-west England, a shortened form of   Pennington   1, from either of the places called Pennington in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Alicea
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Alicea Pennington was born about 1222, in Pennington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Alan I de Peninton. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Baron Roger Venables IV. She died about 1306, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Alicea Pennington est née environ 1222, à Pennington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Alan I de Peninton. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Baron Roger Venables IV. Elle est décédée environ 1306, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alicea Penningtonは約1222年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアペニントンでAlan I de Penintonの娘として生まれた。彼女はBaron Roger Venables IVとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1306年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで86歳で死去した。

ko.Kinderton Cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴 c 훌
ko.lifeSummary: Alicea Pennington(은)는 대략 1222년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 펜잉턴에서 Alan I de Peninton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Baron Roger Venables IV(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1306년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alicea Pennington родилась около 1222 г. в местности пеннингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Alan I de Peninton. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Baron Roger Venables IV. Она умерла около 1306 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет.
